Chains.__comment: DEV ONLY. Points at TRON's Nile testnet (not mainnet) so round-trip testing uses free faucet funds, never real money. Verify this endpoint yourself before relying on it.

Blockchain.__comment: DEV ONLY override of Blockchain:Assets for Nile: keeps the mainnet USDT entry (inert on Nile - the contract doesn't exist there) and adds native TRX so a testnet round-trip needs no token contract.

Gateway.__comment: DEV ONLY. Must match launchSettings.json applicationUrl — it is the host part of the payUrl returned by /api/v1/deposit, so a mismatch hands the payer a dead link.

Withdrawal.__comment: DEV ONLY. LiveTron=true wires the REAL TRON build/sign/broadcast against the Nile testnet (Level 3). It needs a THROWAWAY testnet key + a funded hot wallet in the git-ignored appsettings.Local.json — never here (§10). See docs/withdrawal-testnet.md. Local must set: Withdrawal:HotWallets:Tron:{Address=<throwaway T-address>, KeyReference=kms://tron/hot/0} and KeyManagement:DevSecrets with that same reference -> the 64-hex private key. Keep false unless doing a live testnet run; withdrawal then uses the node-free in-memory signer/engine.
Withdrawal.__comment_policies: DEV ONLY: confirmation depth 1 so an in-memory withdrawal (mined at block 0 on the fresh fake chain) confirms + settles immediately. Min/Max/Fee/ApprovalThreshold come from appsettings.json.

DevSeed.__comment: DEV ONLY. A fixed active test merchant so a signed /api/v1 request works out of the box. SigningSecret is a 64-hex (32-byte) HMAC key — client signs HMAC-SHA256(hexDecode(SigningSecret), "{X-Timestamp}\n{body}"). Override in a git-ignored appsettings.Local.json. Never a real merchant's secret (§10).
DevSeed.Name: Dev Test Merchant

KeyManagement.__comment: DEV ONLY. DevSecrets holds PUBLIC xpubs only — never a seed/mnemonic (§10). Default is the published abandon..about BIP-39 vector. To derive production addresses locally, override the xpub in a git-ignored appsettings.Local.json (same key), not here.
